keyEvents.text: Goal!  Honduras 1, Grenada 0. Edwin Rodríguez (Honduras) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Luis Palma with a cross   following a corner.
Substitution, Grenada. Jermaine Francis replaces Steffon Abraham.
Substitution, Honduras. Joseph Rosales replaces Riky Zapata.
